{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz fafki uhs teem
feho Wahrdu: Mannas Azzis
notezzehs ar Affarahm Deenâs
un Naktis/ un ne mittefees;
Jo ta Jumprawa/ ta Meita
mannu Kanschu irr fatreekta ar
leetu Satreekschanu/ ar fohti
fahyejamu Mohzibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad es ixeemu Laukâ/
tad raugi/ tur irr Nokauti zaar
Schbinu/ nahku es Pillsfahta/
tad raugi/ tur irr Badda Sehr-
gas. Un tik labbi Praueeschi ka
Preesteri skafda apkahrt eeksch
Semmes/ un ne finna neneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Effi tu tad Juhdn wiffai
atmettis? Jeb irrag taiwa Dweh-
fele Zianas apnifeufi? Kapehz
efi tu muhs fittis/ ka preekich
muus Dseedinatchanas newa?
us Meern tohp gaidihts/ bet
neiraid nekahds Labbums/ yn
us. Dseedinaschanas Laiku/ bet
rangi/tur irr Istruhzinafchana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGS/ mehs atsib-
stam sawu Besdeeewibu/ un
muhsfo Tehwo Noseegunu/ jo
mehs effani prett tew grehkojschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne atmett muhs taiwa
Wahrda deht/ un laid taiws
Gohdibas Krehfliis ne tohp nee-
wahts/ peemintt un ne isnihzi-
na taiwu Derribu ar mums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Irrag starp to Pagann
Elka-Deeweem/ kas leek Lectus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "libht? Jeb warrig ta Debbes L
tus doht? Neggi tu effi tas/
KUNGS! muhsfu Deewg? Z
pehz gribbam mehs us tewi g
diht/ jo tu darri wiffas fch
Leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XV. Nodalla.
Deews atbild tam Praueetam/ ka ne k
PreekichLuhgschana wairs ne palihds/
arri Mohsus nn Samuels tur stahwetu
Eepreezina arri to paschu prett wiffu f
Ruhpefschanu/ kas winnam eeksch sawa
mata uhsgahjuft irraid/10/19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas KUNGS ta
ja uhs manni: Jepf
ir Mohsus un Samu
mannâ Preekicha stahwetu/
mehr man ne buhtu labs Bra
pee fscheem Laudim/ dsenn t
nobst no mannas Preekich
un laid tee ahrau eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee us tewi fazzi
Kurp eesim mehs? tad fafki
teem: Ta fakka tas KUNG
Kam ta Nahive useet/ tam
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es peemeeklechn tohe
tschetrkabrtigahm Mohzivat
fakka tas KUNGS: Ar to S
binn/ tohs nokandams/ un
Sunneem tohs raustidams/
ar Putueem appakich Debl
un ar Semmes Swehreem/
tee tohp aprichti un maitatt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es nodohschu tohs/
tee schaubiti taps wiffas S
mes Walstibas/ ManaAus d
"
